story.iWant: a properly configured Next.js project with TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, and shadcn/ui
story.soThat: I have a solid foundation with modern tooling and component library ready for development

subtasks.subtask: Run `npx create-next-app@latest miners-hub-frontend --typescript --tailwind --app --no-src-dir`
Verify project structure: `app/`, `components/`, `lib/`, `types/` directories exist
Verify `next.config.ts`, `tsconfig.json`, `tailwind.config.ts` files exist
Test project runs with `npm run dev`
Verify default Next.js page loads correctly
Verify Tailwind CSS is installed and configured
Create or update `app/globals.css` with CSS custom properties for theming
Define light theme colors: slate-50 primary, white secondary, slate-800 text, amber-600 accent
Define dark theme colors: #0D1117 primary, #161B22 secondary, #F0F6FC text, #FBBF24 accent
Update `tailwind.config.ts` to use CSS custom properties
Test that Tailwind classes work correctly
Run `npx shadcn@latest init` in project root
Verify `components.json` file is created
Configure shadcn/ui with appropriate settings (tailwind config path, component directory)
Test installation by adding a sample component (e.g., `npx shadcn@latest add button`)
Verify component renders correctly
Verify TypeScript is installed
Enable strict mode in `tsconfig.json`
Configure TypeScript compiler options appropriately
Run `npx tsc --noEmit` to verify no type errors
Fix any initial type errors
Verify ESLint is installed (comes with Next.js)
Run `npm run lint` to check for linting errors
Fix any linting errors
Verify linting passes without errors
Run `npm install` to ensure all dependencies are installed
Verify no dependency conflicts in `package.json`
Test that all imported packages work correctly
Verify project builds successfully with `npm run build`

ac.title: Next.js Project Initialization
ac.criteria: Next.js 15+ project initialized with TypeScript, project structure with `app/`, `components/`, `lib/`, `types/` directories, basic configuration files (next.config.ts, tsconfig.json, tailwind.config.ts), the project runs successfully with `npm run dev`

ac.title: Tailwind CSS Configuration
ac.criteria: Tailwind CSS configured with custom theme variables (light/dark mode colors), CSS custom properties defined in root CSS file, Tailwind config file properly set up

ac.title: shadcn/ui Installation
ac.criteria: shadcn/ui installed and configured, components.json configuration file created, initial component setup ready for use

ac.title: TypeScript Configuration
ac.criteria: TypeScript properly configured, TypeScript strict mode enabled, all type checking passes

ac.title: ESLint Configuration
ac.criteria: ESLint properly configured, linting passes without errors

ac.title: Dependencies Installation
ac.criteria: All dependencies installed and working, no dependency conflicts or missing packages

doc.title: Miners Hub - Epic Breakdown
doc.snippet: Story 1.1 defines the project setup requirements: Next.js 15+ with TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, shadcn/ui, ESLint configuration. Uses App Router (not Pages Router), ensures TypeScript strict mode, creates initial directory structure.

doc.title: Miners Hub - Architecture Document
doc.snippet: Architecture specifies Next.js 15+ with App Router, TypeScript enabled, Tailwind CSS configured, App directory structure (no `src/` folder), shadcn/ui component library initialized. Provides exact initialization commands.

doc.title: Miners Hub - Architecture Document
doc.snippet: Technology decisions: Frontend Framework Next.js 15+, UI Component Library shadcn/ui Latest, Project Structure separate repositories. All decisions support the foundation setup.

doc.title: Miners Hub - Architecture Document
doc.snippet: Expected directory structure: `app/` for Next.js App Router, `components/` for React components, `lib/` for utilities and helpers, `types/` for TypeScript types. Defines the complete frontend project layout.

doc.title: Epic Technical Specification: Foundation & Core Infrastructure
doc.snippet: AC1: Frontend Project Setup - Next.js 15+ project with TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, and shadcn/ui configured. The project runs successfully with `npm run dev` and all dependencies are installed and working.

doc.title: Miners Hub - Product Requirements Document
doc.snippet: PRD specifies technical type as Full-Stack Web Application with Frontend Framework: Next.js (React + TypeScript + shadcn/ui), Styling: Tailwind CSS exclusively, Architecture: Full-stack application with frontend (Next.js).

ecosystem.name: Node.js
ecosystem.package: React framework with App Router, SSR, SSG

constraint.rule: Use Next.js App Router (not Pages Router) as specified in Architecture
App directory structure (no `src/` folder) - files go directly in project root with `app/`, `components/`, `lib/`, `types/` directories
TypeScript strict mode must be enabled for type safety throughout the application
Tailwind CSS exclusively - no CSS-in-JS or other styling solutions. Use CSS custom properties for theming in `app/globals.css`
Use shadcn/ui as the primary component library - components are copied into the project, not installed as dependencies
Separate repositories for frontend and backend - this story only sets up the frontend repository

interface.name: TypeScript Configuration
interface.signature: tsconfig.json - TypeScript compiler configuration with strict mode enabled

interface.name: Tailwind Configuration
interface.signature: tailwind.config.ts - Tailwind CSS configuration with theme customization

tests.standards: Manual verification tests are required for this setup story: Verify `npm run dev` starts successfully, `npm run build` completes without errors. No automated tests required for this initialization story. Test framework setup will be added in Story 1.11. Future stories will include automated test coverage following the test strategy (Playwright for E2E, Vitest for unit tests).
tests.locations: Test frameworks will be set up in Story 1.11. Expected locations: `tests/e2e/` for Playwright E2E tests, `__tests__/unit/` for Vitest unit tests, `__tests__/integration/` for integration tests.

test.idea: Manual verification: Run `npm run dev` and verify server starts on expected port (default 3000), verify default Next.js page loads in browser
Manual verification: Apply Tailwind classes to test element, verify styles render correctly, toggle between light/dark themes (if theme toggle exists)
Manual verification: Add shadcn/ui button component, verify it renders correctly, verify component styles apply
Automated verification: Run `npx tsc --noEmit` to verify no TypeScript errors, verify strict mode is enabled in tsconfig.json
Automated verification: Run `npm run lint` and verify no linting errors are reported
Automated verification: Run `npm install` and verify no dependency conflicts, run `npm run build` and verify build succeeds
